data.body:
G3 child-coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child fe57 "Hermetic-but-honest Jira fixtures + verified fake client"), 4-bucket per parent criterion, cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57). VERDICT: clean pairing — no G3 coverage finding attributable to this child; no uncovered parent criterion remains across the roster.

OWNED / CONTRIBUTED by THIS child (fe57 = the foundation: fixtures captured from real Jira + verified fake client served through the production path):
- Parent AC "One round-trip contract test exercises fetcher → snapshot → differs → applier through the production path, using fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" → fe57 CONTRIBUTES the fixture/fake HALF: fe57 AC1 (`tests/fixtures/jira/*.json` hold scrubbed real Jira payloads for search + comment + issuelinks + parent), AC2 (`FakeAcliClient` serves the fixtures through the production fetcher enrichment path with NO shape transformation), AC3 (live-gated capture+scrub script + documented re-capture cadence), AC4 (fixtures consumed only via the production code path; no test reads them and hand-reshapes). The round-trip TEST itself is correctly delegated to keystone 8937 (8937 AC3, which declares depends_on fe57). FULLY covered as a pairing (fixtures/fake → fe57; test → 8937).
- Parent SC "Producer (fetcher + enrichment) and consumers (differs/appliers) cannot drift on snapshot shape without a test failing" → fe57 owns the HONESTY-OF-THE-SOURCE half: fixtures captured from real Jira and served unmassaged through `fetcher.fetch_snapshot` are precisely what prevents the bug-0ee6 failure mode "differs unit-tested against hand-built snapshot dicts in shapes the real fetcher never emits." CONTRIBUTED, complementary to 8937 (schema SSOT + joint round-trip) and 59ef (verified-fake fidelity that keeps fe57's fake honest).
- Parent SC "Bidirectional round-trips (comments, links, parent) for the real Jira shapes are asserted; no probe encodes a bug as expected" → fe57 supplies the real-shape fixtures/fake that 822a's hermetic round-trip reuses (822a declares depends_on fe57). CONTRIBUTED (fixture foundation).
- Parent SC "New tests assert behavior/contract … the suite stays lean; zero change-detector tests added" → fe57's documented re-capture procedure ("so fixtures stay honest and do not rot into change-detectors") applies the anti-change-detector posture to its own artifacts. CONTRIBUTED.

DELEGATION — parent criteria this child does NOT own are correctly assigned to named siblings; fe57's declared OUT items (the contract test that consumes the fixtures → story B/8937; the verified-fake honesty check → story C/59ef) are consistent with the roster:
- AC "A single-source-of-truth snapshot-entry schema module exists as the canonical shape" → 8937 AC1.
- AC "A test validates the fetcher's snapshot output against that schema" → 8937 AC2.
- AC "A test validates each differ's snapshot reads against that schema" → 8937 AC1 (schema covers every field the differs read) + AC3 (round-trip drives inbound_differ + outbound_differ reads against the schema-validated snapshot).
- AC "Outbound application is collapsed to a single production path (no parallel applier remains)" + AC "The retired outbound applier path is deleted" + SC "Outbound sync is exercised through the production code path, not a parallel dead path" → 33d0.
- AC "Outbound sub-op telemetry (links_applied/comments_applied/labels_applied) is surfaced in the structured batch outcome" + AC "computed > 0 && applied == 0 fails loudly, after the warn-first rollout" + SC "A silent sub-op no-op … fails a test/canary instead of passing green" → 2359.
- AC "Bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip is asserted hermetically through the production path" + AC "Every probe assertion that encodes a current bug as expected is converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes" → 822a.
- AC "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests is committed and referenced by new tests (owned by story B)" → 8937 (story B): 8937 description "Owns the epic's guardrail artifact … commit a documented anti-change-detector guardrail … a short docs/ note (ADR-style) … New tests reference it" + 8937 AC5. The parent AC NAMES its owner verbatim; under the G3 ANTI-FP rule (a criterion covered-by-definition by a NAMED consumer counts) this is FULLY covered.

ANTI-FP / the recurring "documented anti-change-detector guardrail only PARTIALLY covered — no sibling produces a governing artifact" finding (raised against fe57 and siblings in early audits) is a FALSE POSITIVE and stays WITHDRAWN. It was raised against a paraphrased "governs new tests" wording that does not match the plan text; the actual parent AC explicitly names story B (= 8937) as owner and is delivered by 8937's description + AC5. The same false positive has already been withdrawn across siblings 2359/33d0/59ef/822a and on 8937.

4-bucket summary for this pairing:
- FULLY / CONTRIBUTED (owned share of THIS child): parent AC "round-trip contract test … using fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" (fixture/fake half — fe57 AC1/AC2/AC3/AC4; test half → 8937); parent SC "producer/consumers cannot drift on snapshot shape" (honest-source half); parent SC "bidirectional round-trips for real Jira shapes" (fixture foundation reused by 822a); parent SC "zero change-detector / lean" (re-capture honesty).
- COVERED-BY-NAMED-SIBLING: SSOT schema + fetcher/differ schema validation + round-trip test (8937); applier collapse + retired-path deletion + production-path exercise (33d0); sub-op telemetry + silent-no-op canary (2359); hermetic bidirectional round-trip + probe de-encoding (822a); verified-fake fidelity (59ef); documented anti-change-detector guardrail (8937, named owner).
- STRUCTURAL/AGGREGATE: parent AC "All six child stories are closed; the full reconciler suite is green."
- PARTIALLY / UNCOVERED: none.

No G3 coverage finding for this pairing. fe57's owned share (real-Jira fixtures + FakeAcliClient served through the production fetcher enrichment with no shape massaging + live-gated capture/scrub script + re-capture doc) is fully delivered and is the foundation the round-trip (8937), verified-fake honesty (59ef), and bidirectional probe (822a) build on. The union of children covers every parent acceptance/success criterion; none is left uncovered by, or solely-and-uncovered on, this child.
